subcodes.first_line: O tender saplings of existence! It is my fervent hope that in this divine springtime and radiant day, ye may be sustained by the showers from the clouds of grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهالهای وجود امید آنکه در این ربیع رحمانی و یوم نورانی از امطار سحاب فضل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @call to action, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
